sections.paragraph:
θεομακάριστος, ον blessed by God of Polycarp θεομακαριστότατος IPol 7:2. Also of Christ’s passion θ. … πάθους ISm 1:2. S. next entry.—DELG s.v. μάκαρ.

IPol IPol = Ignatius to Polycarp—List 1

ISm ISm = Ignatius to the Smyrnaeans, I–II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 449
